mapper.select: select j.*, dr.delivery_time as deliveryTime,dr.status as deliveryStatus from delivery_record dr inner join job_post j on dr.job_id = j.id where dr.user_id = #{userId} order by dr.delivery_time DESC

select dr.*,j.job_name,u.username from delivery_record dr join job_post j on j.id = dr.job_id join user_info u on u.id = dr.user_id where j.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} order by dr.delivery_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into delivery_record(user_id, job_id, delivery_time, status) values(#{userId}, #{jobId}, now(), 0)
